emails.subject: Re: Q1 Financial Review Follow-up
emails.body_summary: Discussed discrepancies between projected and actual expenses, need further breakdown.

meetings.title: Mid-year Budget Review
meetings.transcript_summary: Reviewed year-to-date expenses versus 2026 projections and strategies to mitigate overspending.
meetings.description: Critical assessment of financial standing for 2026.

commitments.description: Compile comparative report on expenses and budget predictions

operational_insights.title: YTD 2026 Spending Compared to 2025 Projections
operational_insights.summary: Current expenditure nearly aligns with 2025 projections, but categories like office supplies are slightly over budget.
operational_insights.recommended_action: Re-evaluate discretionary spending in office supplies
operational_insights.explanation: Predicted office supplies budget exceeded due to unforeseen project expansions.

operational_insights.title: Office Supplies Budget Warning
operational_insights.summary: Office supplies spending shows 20% overage from last quarter.
operational_insights.explanation: Unusual spending patterns detected; potential savings identified.

expected_answer_facts: Current spending in office supplies is above projected budget due to project expansions
Refunds and corrective actions are reducing overage impacts
Overall alignment with last year's projections is within 5% margin
